text: I wake up at six o’clock every morning, which helps me start my day calmly. First, I drink a glass of water and do a short stretching routine. After getting dressed, I have a simple breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My work schedule begins at eight, and I focus on my tasks until noon. In the afternoon, I take a fifteen-minute break to walk around the office. After work, I always exercise—either a thirty-minute jog or a yoga class. In the evening, I prepare dinner, read for about thirty minutes, and then watch an episode of a show. I go to bed at ten, as consistency is key for my energy and health.
